sections.paragraph:
Original: משׁמן

Transliteration: mashmân

Phonetic: mash-mawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. fatness, fat piece, fertile place, richly prepared food
    1. fat, fatness, fat pieces
    2. oil, olive oil
  2. fatness
    1. stout, vigorous
    2. fertile spots or places

Origin: from H8080

TWOT entry: 2410e,2410f

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
